sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109983" key="u(yi/polos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑψῐ´-πολος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n109983.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">soaring on high,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὑψιπόλοις ἀγέλαισιν οἰωνῶν</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:3:111" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.111</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
